indexId.description: ID of the index to retrieve

documentId.description: ID of the document to update

bulkOperation.description: Whether to use the bulk operation to update the document/s

_source_excludes.description: Comma-separated list of source fields to exclude from the response

_source_includes.description: Comma-separated list of source fields to include in the response

stored_fields.description: Whether to retrieve the document fields stored in the index rather than the document _source. Defaults to false.

allow_no_indices.description: If false, return an error if any of the following targets only missing/closed indices: wildcard expression, index alias, or _all value. Defaults to true.

allow_partial_search_results.description:
If true, return partial results if there are shard request timeouts or shard failures.

If false, returns an error with no partial results. Defaults to true.

.

batched_reduce_size.description: Number of shard results that should be reduced at once on the coordinating node. Defaults to 512.

ccs_minimize_roundtrips.description: Whether network round-trips between the coordinating node and the remote clusters are minimized when executing cross-cluster search (CCS) requests. Defaults to true.

docvalue_fields.description: Comma-separated list of fields to return as the docvalue representation of a field for each hit

expand_wildcards.description: Type of index that wildcard expressions can match. Defaults to open

explain.description: Whether to return detailed information about score computation as part of a hit. Defaults to false.

ignore_throttled.description: Whether concrete, expanded or aliased indices are ignored when frozen. Defaults to true.

ignore_unavailable.description: Whether missing or closed indices are not included in the response. Defaults to false.

max_concurrent_shard_requests.description: Define the number of shard requests per node this search executes concurrently. Defaults to 5.

pre_filter_shard_size.description: Define a threshold that enforces a pre-filter roundtrip to prefilter search shards based on query rewriting. Only used if the number of shards the search request expands to exceeds the threshold.

request_cache.description: Whether the caching of search results is enabled for requests where size is 0. See Elasticsearch shard request cache settings.

search_type.description: How distributed term frequencies are calculated for relevance scoring. Defaults to Query then Fetch.

seq_no_primary_term.description: Whether to return the sequence number and primary term of the last modification of each hit. See Optimistic concurrency control.

stats.description: Tag of the request for logging and statistical purposes

terminate_after.description: Max number of documents to collect for each shard

timeout.description: Period to wait for active shards. Defaults to 1m (one minute). See the Elasticsearch time units reference

track_scores.description: Whether to calculate and return document scores, even if the scores are not used for sorting. Defaults to false.

track_total_hits.description: Number of hits matching the query to count accurately. Defaults to 10000.

version.description: Whether to return document version as part of a hit. Defaults to false.

pipeline.description: ID of the pipeline to use to preprocess incoming documents

refresh.description: If true, Elasticsearch refreshes the affected shards to make this operation visible to search,if wait_for then wait for a refresh to make this operation visible to search,if false do nothing with refreshes

true.description: Refreshes the affected shards to make this operation visible to search

wait_for.description: Wait for a refresh to make this operation visible

simple.description: Whether to return a simplified version of the response instead of the raw data

returnAll.description: Whether to return all results or only up to a given limit

paginateNotice.displayName: By default, you cannot page through more than 10,000 hits. To page through more hits, add "Sort" from options.

limit.description: Max number of results to return

dataToSend.description: Whether to insert the input data this node receives in the new row

defineBelow.description: Set the value for each destination column

autoMapInputData.description: Use when node input properties match destination column names

inputsToIgnore.description: List of input properties to avoid sending, separated by commas. Leave empty to send all properties.

documentId.description: ID of the document to create and add to the index

timeout.description: Period to wait for a response. If no response is received before the timeout expires, the request fails and returns an error. Defaults to 30s. See the Elasticsearch time units reference

aliases.description: Index aliases which include the index, as an alias object

include_type_name.description: Whether a mapping type is expected in the body of mappings. Defaults to false.

mappings.description: Mapping for fields in the index, as mapping object

master_timeout.description: Period to wait for a connection to the master node. If no response is received before the timeout expires, the request fails and returns an error. Defaults to 1m. See the Elasticsearch time units reference

settings.description: Configuration options for the index, as an index settings object

wait_for_active_shards.description: The number of shard copies that must be active before proceeding with the operation. Set to all or any positive integer up to the total number of shards in the index. Default: 1, the primary shard

allow_no_indices.description: If false, return an error if any of the following targets only missing/closed indices: wildcard expression, index alias, or _all value. Defaults to true.

expand_wildcards.description: Type of index that wildcard expressions can match. Defaults to open

flat_settings.description: Whether to return settings in flat format. Defaults to false.

ignore_unavailable.description: Whether to request that target a missing index return an error. Defaults to false.

include_defaults.description: Whether to return all default settings in the response. Defaults to false.

local.description: Whether to retrieve information from the local node only. Defaults to false.
